hypothesis: A three-fidelity delta-learning framework that learns corrections from GFN1-xTB to DFT+U and from DFT+U to HSE06 to predict high-fidelity HSE06 band gaps in MOFs will achieve a statistically significant reduction in MAE compared with the two-fidelity GFN1-xTB to HSE06 delta-learning, particularly for MOFs containing 3d transition metals.
